name: Nutted Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, beat together the shredded cheddar and low-fat cottage cheese with an electric mixer on high until well combined.
2. Add the Port wine, chopped parsley, dry mustard, and ground red pepper to the mixture. Beat until all ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
3. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
4. Chill the mixture for at least 30 minutes before serving.
